title: Identity Lock Lookbook
description: A reference-dependent lookbook where the same synthetic model identity is preserved while outfits change.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes a synthetic model identity card; images 02-04 depend on it as --ref and change only wardrobe, not face, hair, body, skin tone, or pose language.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Identity Lock Lookbook
en.description: A reference-dependent lookbook where the same synthetic model identity is preserved while outfits change.

zh-CN.title: 身份锁定造型册
zh-CN.description: 同一合成模特身份保持不变，只改变服装造型的参考依赖系列。
